MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-31-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. - CLAUDE ARMAND WYLE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. JAMES PICKER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT WAYNE OSTIN HOY VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT ASSIGNS A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH COURT SETTLEMENT OFFICER PANG LY. PARTIES TO CONTACT MISS LY BY 4:00 PM TODAY VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON MAR-21-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. MR. PICKER WAIVED NOTICE AND WILL GIVE NOTICE TO MR. WYLE. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
